1_constitution: Instagram analysis is format-first: compare Reels, carousels, and static posts separately. Prefer owned conversion metrics when present; otherwise rank by engagement quality.

2_format_rules.reel: Judge Reels by opening hook, watch metrics when available, comments, and intent actions.
2_format_rules.carousel: Judge carousels by cover claim, slide structure, saves, shares, and comments.
2_format_rules.static: Judge static posts by clarity of message, caption opening, CTA, and engagement quality.
